title: Modulo_B_Personal_Creativo
description: Capítulo IV, Sección I, Apartado B — Lineamientos EFICINE Producción enero 2026. PASS/FAIL: If ANY element is missing, project is NOT evaluated and CANNOT be considered susceptible.

b1_experiencia_productor_y_director.description: FORMATO 2 CVs. The producer and director have specific minimum experience thresholds that are hard requirements.

es_socio_erpi.description: MANDATORY: The producer MUST be a partner/shareholder of the ERPI. If false, project is automatically disqualified. For persona física ERPI, producer IS the ERPI.

responsabilidades.const: Gestión del financiamiento, supervisión integral de la producción, responsabilidad final de la terminación y exhibición de la obra.
responsabilidades.description: Per Lineamientos: 'tendrá a su cargo la gestión del financiamiento, la supervisión integral de la producción y la responsabilidad final de la terminación y exhibición.'

exhibicion_comercial.description: Must have been exhibited in: commercial theaters, AND/OR festivals in official selection, AND/OR subscription/rental/purchase VOD platforms per Regla 1 inciso k).

venue_exhibicion.description: Specify where: theater chain, festival name, platform name

cumple_umbral.description: VALIDATION: Fiction/Documentary = at least 1 feature exhibited commercially. Animation = 1 feature OR 3 shorts exhibited. If false → FATAL ERROR: project cannot proceed.

filmografia_comprobatoria.description: Must prove prior directing experience with HYPERLINKS to completed works.

enlace_visionado.description: MANDATORY. Must be freely accessible — no password, no email registration required.

cumple_umbral.description: VALIDATION: Fiction/Documentary = 1 feature OR 2 shorts/audiovisual works completed (as director or co-director). Animation = 1 feature OR 1 short completed. If false → FATAL ERROR.

b1_resto_equipo_creativo_formato_2.description: FORMATO 2 for remaining creative team. Required roles: Guionista, Director de Fotografía, Director de Arte / Diseñador de Producción, Editor. Their CVs are evaluated for: trajectory, capacity to complete the project, coherence with proposals and budget.

es_mujer.description: Used for bonus points calculation (category d).

es_indigena_afromexicano.description: Used for bonus points calculation (category d).

b2_acreditacion_nacionalidad.description: Valid nationality/work authorization for ALL creative team members.

enum: Tarjeta de Residencia Temporal con permiso de trabajo
Tarjeta de Residencia Permanente con permiso de trabajo

vigente.description: Must be current/valid. Expired documents = rejection.

carta_autoadscripcion_indigena.description: Required ONLY if director claims indigenous/Afro-Mexican identity for bonus points.

b3_contratos_productor_director.description: Signed contracts between ERPI and the producer AND director. MANDATORY elements — missing ANY = project not evaluated.

titulo_proyecto.description: MUST match the registered project title EXACTLY.

justificacion_funciones.description: Description of duties to be performed.

monto_mxn.description: CRITICAL CROSS-CHECK: Must match EXACTLY the corresponding line item in presupuesto desglose AND flujo de efectivo. Lineamientos recommend highlighting in a colored box.

tipo_aportacion.description: If 'Especie', must be stated in contract AND must match esquema financiero.

vigencia.description: Contract term MUST cover preproducción, producción, and/or postproducción as appropriate to the role, congruent with ruta crítica.

tiene_firma_erpi.description: Autograph or digital signature of ERPI legal representative.

tiene_firma_contratado.description: Autograph or digital signature of the producer/director.

carta_uso_imagen_documental.description: ONLY for documentary: authorization letter from main participants for use of their image. Must have autograph or digital signature.
